title: Surgeon Vacancy at Wockhardt Hospitals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Wockhardt Hospitals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Wockhardt Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wockhardt Hospitals:
Wockhardt Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
